---
title: "Class 6 Introduction to R"
output: html_document
date: "2026-07-04"
---

# Reference the packages that you are going to use 

```{r setup}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(readxl)
library(haven)
```


## import a csv file

```{r}
litters_df = read_csv("data_import_examples/data_import_examples/FAS_litters.csv")
```

## import an excel file

```{r}
read_excel("data_import_examples/data_import_examples/mlb11.xlsx",
           sheet = "mlb11"
           )
```



## view the dataset

-  head/tail see the first few or last few rows of the data 
-  view() see the dataset *make sure you don't knit that since it can mess up r-markdown

```{r}
head(litters_df)
tail(litters_df, 2)
```

## janitor clean name 

clean up names into snake_case
```{r}
litters_df = janitor::clean_names(litters_df)
head(litters_df)
```
